org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core

Class Kernel<AT extends Agent,ET extends Environment<AT>,YP extends YellowPages,MTS extends MessageTransportService>

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core.Kernel<AT,ET,YP,MTS>
  • Type Parameters:
    AT - is the type of agent supported by this kernel
    ET - is the type of environment supported by this kernel
    YP - is the type of yellow page supported by this kernel
    MTS - is the type of message transport service supported by this kernel.
    All Implemented Interfaces:
    Runnable
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    Game, Game, Game, NetworkKernel
    Deprecated. 
    See "http://www.janus-project.org"

    @Deprecated
public class Kernel<AT extends Agent,ET extends Environment<AT>,YP extends YellowPages,MTS extends MessageTransportService>
extends Object
implements Runnable
    Kernel of the TinyMAS application.

    The kernel is the central point of the multiagent platform.

    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND <galland@arakhne.org>, Nicolas GAUD <nicolas.gaud@utbm.fr>

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int KERNEL_STOP_TIMEOUT
      Deprecated. 
      Timeout in milliseconds to wait about kernel stop.
      static int TIME_PRECISION
      Deprecated. 
      This is the minimal duration which can be measured by an operating system (in milliseconds).

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description

      Create a kernel with the default components.

      Create a kernel with the specified components.

      Replies the count of agents registered inside this kernel.

      Replies the identifier of the specified agent.

      Deprecated. 
      Replies the environment used by this kernel (if it exist).

      Deprecated. 
      Replies the identifier of this kernel.
      long getKernelStep()
      Deprecated. 
      Replies the count of simulation turns since the start of the kernel.
      long getKernelStepDuration()
      Deprecated. 
      Replies the duration in milliseconds of one turn of the kernel.

      Deprecated. 
      Replies the message transport service used by this kernel.

      Deprecated. 
      Replies a probe on the specified agent.

      Deprecated. 
      Replies the list of agents that provide the specified service

      Deprecated. 
      Replies the simulation clock associated to this kernel.

      Deprecated. 
      Replies the unique instance of Kernel.
      YP getYellowPageSystem()
      Deprecated. 
      Replies the yellow pages used by this kernel.
      boolean isOnThisKernel(AgentIdentifier agent)
      Deprecated. 
      Replies if this agent identifier corresponds to an agent inside this kernel.
      boolean isShutdown()
      Deprecated. 
      Replies if this kernel was launch, but is now shutdown.
      boolean isStopped()
      Deprecated. 
      Replies if the kernel is not running.
      boolean isUnderPause()
      Deprecated. 
      Replies if this kernel is under pause.

      Kill an agent.

      Deprecated. 
      Push the current kernel under pause.

      Push the singleton kernel under pause.

      Replies a probe on the specified agent.

      Agent lif-cycle: starts all the specified agents.

      Deprecated.

    • Method Detail

      • getSingleton

        public static Kernel<?,?,?,?> getSingleton()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the unique instance of Kernel.
        Returns:
        the singleton
        See Also:
        registerAsSingleton()

      • registerAsSingleton

        public boolean registerAsSingleton()
        Deprecated. 
        Register this kernel as the singleton.
        Returns:
        true if this kernel is now the singleton, otherwise false
        See Also:
        getSingleton()

      • getMTS

        MTS getMTS()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the message transport service used by this kernel.
        Returns:
        the MTS

      • getEnvironment

        public ET getEnvironment()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the environment used by this kernel (if it exist).
        Returns:
        the environment

      • setEnvironment

        public void setEnvironment(ET env)
        Deprecated. 
        Set the environment that should be used by this kernel.
        Parameters:
        env -

      • addAgent

        public void addAgent(Agent agent)
        Deprecated. 
        Add an agent inside this kernel.

        The kernel assumes that the specified agent was never spawn before. An unique identifier will be provided to the specified agent.

        Parameters:
        agent -

      • addAgent

        public void addAgent(AgentIdentifier id,
            AT a)
        Deprecated. 
        Add an agent inside this kernel.

        The kernel assumes that the specified agent was already spawn before. The specified identifier will be given to the agent (if it is unique).

        Parameters:
        id -
        a -

      • killAgent

        void killAgent(AgentIdentifier id)
        Deprecated. 
        Kill an agent.

        This method should only be invoked by Agent.killMe().

        The agent will be removed at the end of the current scheduling step.

        Parameters:
        id -
        See Also:
        removeAgent(AgentIdentifier)

      • removeAgent

        void removeAgent(AgentIdentifier id)
        Deprecated. 
        Kill an agent.

        The agent will be removed immediately.

        Parameters:
        id -
        See Also:
        killAgent(AgentIdentifier)

      • removeAllAgents

        void removeAllAgents()
        Deprecated. 
        Kill immediately all the agents.

      • getAgentId

        AgentIdentifier getAgentId(AT a)
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the identifier of the specified agent.
        Parameters:
        a -
        Returns:
        the identifier.

      • run

        public void run()
        Deprecated. 
        Run the kernel.

        This method invokes:

        • runInitializationStage()
        • runAgentLifeStage()
        • runShutdownStage()
        Specified by:
        run in interface Runnable
        See Also:
        runInitializationStage(), runAgentLifeStage(), runShutdownStage()

      • runInitializationStage

        protected void runInitializationStage()
        Deprecated. 
        Run the initialization stage of the kernel.
        See Also:
        run(), runAgentLifeStage(), runShutdownStage()

        Deprecated.

        Deprecated.

        Deprecated. 
        Agent lif-cycle: starts all the specified agents.

        Deprecated.

        protected void stopAgents(Collection<AT> agents)
        Deprecated. 
        Notify of the specified agents that they are dead.
        Parameters:
        agents -

      • isStopped

        public boolean isStopped()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies if the kernel is not running. If the kernel is under pause, this function replies true
        Returns:
        true if the kernel was stopped, otherwise false

      • isUnderPause

        public boolean isUnderPause()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies if this kernel is under pause.
        Returns:
        true if the kernel was paused, otherwise false

      • isShutdown

        public boolean isShutdown()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies if this kernel was launch, but is now shutdown.
        Returns:
        true if the kernel was shutdown, otherwise false

      • stop

        public void stop()
        Deprecated. 
        Stop the kernel.

      • stopKernel

        public static void stopKernel()
        Deprecated. 
        Stop the kernel singleton.

        public void pause()
        Deprecated. 
        Push the current kernel under pause.

      • pauseKernel

        public static void pauseKernel()
        Deprecated. 
        Push the singleton kernel under pause.

      • probe

        public static Probe probe(AgentIdentifier agentId)
        Deprecated. 
        Replies a probe on the specified agent.
        Parameters:
        agentId -
        Returns:
        a probe or null if the agent could not provide a probe.

        public long getAgentCount()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the count of agents registered inside this kernel.

        the count of agents.

      • isOnThisKernel

        public boolean isOnThisKernel(AgentIdentifier agent)
        Deprecated. 
        Replies if this agent identifier corresponds to an agent inside this kernel.
        Parameters:
        agent -
        Returns:
        true if the given agent is on this kernel, otherwise false

      • getKernelStep

        public long getKernelStep()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the count of simulation turns since the start of the kernel.
        Returns:
        the count of turns

      • getKernelStepDuration

        public long getKernelStepDuration()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the duration in milliseconds of one turn of the kernel.
        Returns:
        the duration of a turn.

      • getSimulationClock

        public SimulationClock getSimulationClock()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the simulation clock associated to this kernel.

        This function replies the clock of the environment if it exists or an internal clock based on the kernel steps.

        Returns:
        never null
        See Also:
        getKernelStep(), getKernelStepDuration()

      • addKernelListener

        public void addKernelListener(KernelListener listener)
        Deprecated. 
        Add a listener.
        Parameters:
        listener -

        public void removeKernelListener(KernelListener listener)
        Deprecated. 
        remove a listener.
        Parameters:
        listener -

        public Probe getProbe(AgentIdentifier agentId)
        Deprecated. 
        Replies a probe on the specified agent.
        Parameters:
        agentId -
        Returns:
        a probe or null if the agent could not provide a probe.
